founder.name: Ren Ito
founder.bio: Systems engineer in Tokyo. First company Shimmer (real-time collaboration) shut down in 2019 after failing to find distribution. Now building Vectorly.

score_history.note: Shimmer launch; promising tech, weak GTM
Shimmer wound down - failed to find distribution, honest post-mortem published
Vectorly rebound - applied hard lessons on distribution, faster traction

company.name: Shimmer
company.one_liner: Real-time collaborative editor for design systems. Wound down in 2019.

content.title: Show HN: Shimmer - realtime collaboration for design systems
content.author: renito

content.title: What killed Shimmer: a distribution post-mortem
content.summary: Honest write-up: great product, no repeatable channel. Ran out of runway.
